CustomField.formula: Contact.FirstName&" "&Contact.LastName&" is "& IF(IsActive,"","former ")&RelatedContact.FirstName&" "&RelatedContact.LastName &"'s "& Lower(PartyRoleRelation.RoleName)&"."&BR() & BR() & RelatedContact.FirstName&" "&RelatedContact.LastName &" is "&Contact.FirstName&" "&Contact.LastName&"'s "& IF(IsActive,"","former ")& Lower(PartyRoleRelation.RelatedRoleName)&"."
CustomField.label: Explanation
